Techno Brain Unveils First Microsoft Software Testing Centre In Africa

Techno Brain has partnered with Microsoft Corporation to launch Africa’s first-ever testing and quality assurance center. Located in Nairobi, Kenya, this pioneering initiative aims to elevate software quality assurance across the continent. The center will provide comprehensive testing services to ensure applications meet the highest standards of quality and reliability. By fostering local talent and leveraging cutting-edge technology, Techno Brain and Microsoft are set to drive innovation and enhance the standards of software development in Africa.
